productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherette Beige Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun! Height: 26 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 14 cm Made of synthetic leather for durability Has two zippered compartments, two inner zippers and organiser sleeve for a mobile and essentials Two short straps for carrying ease and style Additional one long strap inside Brand name appliqué d on the front One zippered pocket at the back for additional space Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
